expectedIssues: Wrong Poker item is highlighted in the bottom nav bar
reportedIssues: The sticky bottom navigation bar overlaps the content area, hiding the lower row of game cards behind it.
Several horizontally arranged elements are cut off at the right edge, including the 'Hot Games' tab and the rightmost game tiles in the grids.

expected.reasoning: Neither reported issue describes a wrong Poker item being highlighted in the bottom nav bar; they describe layout overlap and right-edge cutoff problems instead.
